title: Figure 1 in Saccharomyces cerevisiae OS303 expression of an alkaline protease from a newly isolated Bacillus subtilis D9
author: Alqosaibi, A. I.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.title: Figure 1
steps.instruction: Figure 1. The electrophoresis of PCR product of alkaline protease gene from Bacillus subtilis D9. After PCR, 5Μl of the product was run on 1% agarose gel electrophoresis. The expected band of approximately1300bp was observed. Lane 1: DNA size marker hyperladder I; Lane 2: PCR product sample.
